title: Audit Annotations — pod-security.kubernetes.io/audit-violations
text:
Example:
pod-security.kubernetes.io/audit-violations: would violate PodSecurity "restricted:latest": allowPrivilegeEscalation != false (container "example" must set securityContext.allowPrivilegeEscalation=false), ...
Value details an audit policy violation, it contains the
Pod Security Standard
level
that was transgressed as well as the specific policies on the fields that were
violated from the PodSecurity enforcement.
See
Pod Security Standards
for more information.
